title: tsaraph #6884
definition:
1) to smelt, refine, test
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to smelt, refine
        1a2) to test
        1a3) to test (and prove true)
        1a4) smelter, refiner, goldsmith (participle)
    1b) (Niphal) to be refined
    1c) (Piel) to be a refiner
        1c1) refiner (participle)
nasbUsage:
